languages.text: "Не стоит отправлять бойцов на смерть, когда ксеноересь можно истребить праведным пламенем. Но нельзя поджигать наобум — корни быстро возьмутся и вскоре пожар станет неконтролируемым. Тварей нужно зажать между двух огней, чтобы встречный пал, истребив их, после затушил сам себя".

traits.locale_text: "Не стоит отправлять бойцов на смерть, когда ксеноересь можно истребить праведным пламенем. Но нельзя поджигать наобум — корни быстро возьмутся и вскоре пожар станет неконтролируемым. Тварей нужно зажать между двух огней, чтобы встречный пал, истребив их, после затушил сам себя".

languages.text: "Why send soldiers to their deaths when xenoheresy can be purged by righteous flames? But we cannot burn recklessly, as the roots will ignite in an instant and the wildfire will quickly get out of control. We must trap the beasts between two fires, so that the backburn incinerates them and then burns itself out."
languages.original_text: "Не стоит отправлять бойцов на смерть, когда ксеноересь можно истребить праведным пламенем. Но нельзя поджигать наобум — корни быстро возьмутся и вскоре пожар станет неконтролируемым. Тварей нужно зажать между двух огней, чтобы встречный пал, истребив их, после затушил сам себя".

traits.locale_text: "Why send soldiers to die when xenoheresy can be purged by righteous flames? Yet we cannot strike blindly, as the roots will ignite instantly, and the wildfire will soon grow uncontrollable. We must trap the beasts between two fires, so that the backburn incinerates them and then chokes itself out."
"Burning away xenoblight with the sacred flame of the God-Emperor — what could be more righteous, {name}? Let me give the Zarkovians a lesson in burning out heresy."
"Burning away xenoblight with the sacred flame of the God-Emperor — what could be more righteous, {name}? Let me give the Zarkovians a lesson in burning out heresy."

"Why send soldiers to die when xenoheresy can be purged by righteous flames? Yet we cannot strike blindly, as the roots will ignite instantly, and the wildfire will soon grow uncontrollable. We must trap the beasts between two fires, so that the backburn incinerates them and then chokes itself out."

"Why send soldiers to their deaths when xenoheresy can be purged by righteous flames? But we cannot burn recklessly, as the roots will ignite in an instant and the wildfire will quickly get out of control. We must trap the beasts between two fires, so that the backburn incinerates them and then burns itself out."

languages.text: 「異教の汚染を神帝の聖なる炎で焼き尽くす。これほど正義にかなう行為はないだろう、{name}。ザルコビアンに異端を焼き尽くすことを教えるがいい」
languages.original_text: "Burning away xenoblight with the sacred flame of the God-Emperor — what could be more righteous, {name}? Let me give the Zarkovians a lesson in burning out heresy."

traits.locale_text: 「異教の汚染を神帝の聖なる炎で焼き尽くす。これほど正義にかなう行為はないだろう、{name}。ザルコビアンに異端を焼き尽くすことを教えるがいい。」

languages.text: «¿Por qué enviar soldados a sus tumbas cuando podemos purgar la xenoherejía con llamas justas? Aunque no podemos quemar al azar, pues las raíces prenderán en un instante y los incendios se descontrolarán. Debemos atrapar a las bestias entre dos fuegos, para que el calor las incinere sin extenderse más».
languages.original_text: "Why send soldiers to their deaths when xenoheresy can be purged by righteous flames? But we cannot burn recklessly, as the roots will ignite in an instant and the wildfire will quickly get out of control. We must trap the beasts between two fires, so that the backburn incinerates them and then burns itself out."

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué enviar soldados a sus tumbas cuando podemos purgar la xenoherejía con llamas justas? Aunque no podemos quemar al azar, pues las raíces prenderán en un instante y los incendios se descontrolarán. Debemos atrapar a las bestias entre dos fuegos, para que el calor las incinere sin extenderse más».

languages.text: “既然异形造物可以被正义的烈焰净化，又何必派士兵去送死？但我们也不能乱烧，根系一点就燃，火势很快就会失控。我们必须用两道火线将怪物夹在中间，让回燃的火将它们烧成灰烬，再自行熄灭。”
languages.original_text: "Why send soldiers to their deaths when xenoheresy can be purged by righteous flames? But we cannot burn recklessly, as the roots will ignite in an instant and the wildfire will quickly get out of control. We must trap the beasts between two fires, so that the backburn incinerates them and then burns itself out."

traits.locale_text: “既然异形造物可以被正义的烈焰净化，又何必派士兵去送死？但我们也不能乱烧，根系一点就燃，火势很快就会失控。我们必须用两道火线将怪物夹在中间，让回燃的火将它们烧成灰烬，再自行熄灭。”

languages.text: "Wozu Soldaten in den Tod schicken, wenn Xeno-Ketzerei auch mit rechtschaffenen Flammen ausgebrannt werden kann? Wir dürfen allerdings nicht leichtsinnig sein, weil die Wurzeln sofort Feuer fangen und der Brand rasch außer Kontrolle geraten könnte. Wir müssen die Bestien zwischen zwei Bränden in die Zange nehmen, damit sie das Gegenfeuer in Brand steckt, ehe es von selbst ausbrennt."
languages.original_text: "Why send soldiers to their deaths when xenoheresy can be purged by righteous flames? But we cannot burn recklessly, as the roots will ignite in an instant and the wildfire will quickly get out of control. We must trap the beasts between two fires, so that the backburn incinerates them and then burns itself out."

traits.locale_text: "Wozu Soldaten in den Tod schicken, wenn Xeno-Ketzerei auch mit rechtschaffenen Flammen ausgebrannt werden kann? Wir dürfen allerdings nicht leichtsinnig sein, weil die Wurzeln sofort Feuer fangen und der Brand rasch außer Kontrolle geraten könnte. Wir müssen die Bestien zwischen zwei Bränden in die Zange nehmen, damit sie das Gegenfeuer in Brand steckt, ehe es von selbst ausbrennt."

languages.text: "Zeno kâfirliği ilahi alevlerle temizlenebilecekken askerleri neden ölüme gönderelim? Ancak pervasızca yakamayız çünkü kökler bir anda tutuşacak ve yangın hızla kontrolden çıkacaktır. Yaratıkları iki ateş arasında bırakmalıyız, böylece geri tepen ateş onları yakıp kül edecek ve sonra kendiliğinden sönecektir."
languages.original_text: "Why send soldiers to their deaths when xenoheresy can be purged by righteous flames? But we cannot burn recklessly, as the roots will ignite in an instant and the wildfire will quickly get out of control. We must trap the beasts between two fires, so that the backburn incinerates them and then burns itself out."

traits.locale_text: "Zeno kâfirliği ilahi alevlerle temizlenebilecekken askerleri neden ölüme gönderelim? Ancak pervasızca yakamayız çünkü kökler bir anda tutuşacak ve yangın hızla kontrolden çıkacaktır. Yaratıkları iki ateş arasında bırakmalıyız, böylece geri tepen ateş onları yakıp kül edecek ve sonra kendiliğinden sönecektir."

languages.text: « Pourquoi envoyer des soldats à leur mort quand la xénohérésie peut être purgée par les flammes sacrées ? Mais il ne faut pas pour autant tout brûler sans réfléchir, car les racines s'enflammeront en un instant et les feux de brousse risquent d'échapper rapidement à tout contrôle. Nous devons piéger les bêtes entre deux feux, afin que le retour de flammes les incinère avant de s'éteindre de lui-même. »
languages.original_text: "Why send soldiers to their deaths when xenoheresy can be purged by righteous flames? But we cannot burn recklessly, as the roots will ignite in an instant and the wildfire will quickly get out of control. We must trap the beasts between two fires, so that the backburn incinerates them and then burns itself out."

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi envoyer des soldats à leur mort quand la xénohérésie peut être purgée par les flammes sacrées ? Mais il ne faut pas pour autant tout brûler sans réfléchir, car les racines s'enflammeront en un instant et les feux de brousse risquent d'échapper rapidement à tout contrôle. Nous devons piéger les bêtes entre deux feux, afin que le retour de flammes les incinère avant de s'éteindre de lui-même. »
